hypothesis: Candidate-level exceptions to one-slot scarce breakout deferral may recover high-quality breakout winners without reopening global candidate ordering, global capacity, or broad breakout de-risking.
result_summary: Rejected. Best near-high exception was unchanged in late_strong/mid_weak and regressed old_thin EV by -0.0448 with PnL -$2,169.46.
next_action: Do not retry TQS or 52-week-proximity scarce-slot breakout exceptions without orthogonal event/state evidence.
